title: Pilot Final: clarify portfolio insight confidence legend for users
problem: Users misread confidence labeling in insight area, which lowers trust in generated signals.
evidence: manual ux observation: confidence label ambiguity
benchmark: competitor tools show explicit confidence legend
proposed_change: Add explicit confidence legend and context subtitle near insight card; keep scope user-facing and single-component.
expected_benefit: Users interpret insight confidence correctly, improving trust and reducing confusion.
